raw_consumer_statement: There were multiple transactions on my credit card throughout the end of XXXX up to mid XXXX. I called them in at least XXXX times about this. The first time was Friday XX/XX/XXXX, another time on XX/XX/XXXX, and I also tried disputing the charges online. They keep saying that there's a " system error '' and that it's being worked on. But at the end of the day, almost XXXX weeks have passed, and still nothing.
